name: Nonrecognition of Gain on CTF to RIC Transfers

eligibility.description: The transfer must be solely for stock in the RIC and the common trust fund must meet specific diversification requirements under section 368(a)(2)(F)(ii).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: No gain or loss is recognized when a common trust fund transfers substantially all assets to a Regulated Investment Company (RIC) in exchange for stock which is then distributed to participants.
